case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. NATHANIEL LEE WOODARD et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-13-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212)
